channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Men increasingly embrace cosmetic procedures, as Rylan Clark and Bobby Norris showcase results
item.description: In her latest column, Sarah Vine examines the growing trend of cosmetic procedures among men, highlighting TV personalities Rylan Clark and Bobby Norris, as well as livestreamer Braden Peters (known a...

item.title: Understanding Gen Z Slang: The Meaning of 'Slay'
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios, a leading media and entertainment company in the Philippines, highlights popular expressions among the younger generation, particularly Gen Z. Today’s focus is on the slang term 'slay...

item.title: Legendary April Fools' Prank Involved Fake Volcanic Eruption in Sitka, Alaska
item.description: On April 1, 1974, the quiet town of Sitka, Alaska, was momentarily thrown into panic when smoke appeared to rise from the dormant Hedgecumbe volcano. After more than four thousand years without activi...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets secure overtime victory against Chicago Blackhawks after losing lead
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets secured a hard-fought 4-3 overtime victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Tuesday, closing in on a playoff spot in the Western Conference. Despite falling behind 1-0 in the first ...

item.title: Understanding the Unfinished Buddhist, Hindu, and Jain Caves at Ellora
item.description: The rock-cut caves at Ellora, renowned for their intricate sculptures and architectural splendour, include a significant number of unfinished monuments spanning Buddhist, Hindu, and Jain traditions. '...

item.title: Workers Across India Protest Against New Labour Codes Amid Industrial Accidents and Economic Pressures
item.description: In Panipat, Haryana, a major struggle for labour rights has unfolded at the Indian Oil Corporation Limited’s Refinery and Petrochemical Complex. Following a tragic industrial accident on February 24, ...

item.title: Derby man charged following vehicle collision injuring seven pedestrians
item.description: A 36-year-old man, Sandhu Ponnachan, has been charged following an incident in Derby city centre in which a car mounted the pavement and struck seven pedestrians on Saturday evening. The collision occ...

item.title: Travelers face long queues and fully booked buses, flights, and ferries this Holy Wednesday
item.description: On Holy Wednesday, travelers experienced heavy congestion as they headed to provincial destinations for Holy Week. At bus terminals in Quezon City, passengers bound for Northern Luzon provinces like I...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens defeat Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1, continuing strong season streak
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens secured a dominant 4-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning, marking their sixth consecutive win of the season. Juraj Slafkovsky, turning 22, had a standout performance, scoring...

item.title: Comparing the Rhine and Danube Rivers for First-Time European River Cruises
item.description: For Australians planning their first European river cruise in 2026, the choice often comes down to the Rhine or the Danube. The Rhine offers a romantic, storybook experience with picturesque medieval ...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Shares Story of Supportive Saudi Employer During Unplanned Pregnancy
item.description: Martha Wafula, a 27-year-old woman from Bungoma, Kenya, has expressed immense gratitude to her former employer in Saudi Arabia who supported her during a challenging unplanned pregnancy. Martha moved ...

item.title: Filipino Faith and Lenten Traditions Across Generations
item.description: Filipino religious devotion has long been expressed through traditions like the Pabasa, Senakulo, and Visita Iglesia, especially during Holy Week. Monsignor John Bañas Brillantes from the Military Ord...

item.title: Trump Announces Possible U.S. Withdrawal from Iran Conflict Within Weeks
item.description: President Donald Trump stated that the United States could end its military engagement in Iran within two to three weeks. He indicated that the U.S. has largely achieved its objectives, including prev...

item.title: Los Angeles Gas Prices Reach $6 per Gallon Amid Iran Conflict; Some Stations Still Offer Lower Rates
item.description: Gas prices in Los Angeles reached an average of $6 per gallon on Tuesday, reflecting disruptions in global oil supply linked to the ongoing conflict with Iran. Nationally, average gasoline prices have...

item.title: Government Plans Further Petrol and Diesel Price Hike with Targeted Subsidies

item.title: Jacque Maribe Introduces Her Husband on Social Media
item.description: Former news anchor and journalist Jacque Maribe has recently shared a glimpse of her married life on social media, introducing her husband in a charming clip. Known for her high-profile past relations...

item.title: South Africa Faces Challenges in Reducing Food Waste by 2030
item.description: South Africa discards about a third of its food production annually, roughly 10 million tonnes, while millions of its citizens face hunger. This situation highlights a paradox: the country has enough ...

item.title: Defence cites inconclusive ballistic evidence in Charlie Kirk murder case
item.description: Investigators in the murder of conservative activist Charlie Kirk are facing challenges in linking the fatal bullet to the rifle allegedly used by Tyler Robinson, according to defence documents filed ...

item.title: The King's Upcoming Visit to Washington Amid Tensions with President Trump
item.description: The King is preparing for a high-profile visit to Washington at a time when relations between the United Kingdom and the United States appear strained. The visit follows recent social media remarks fr...

item.title: How Cruises Simplify Travel and Help You Relax
item.description: Planning a vacation can often feel more stressful than rewarding. The process of coordinating flights, hotels, transfers, and schedules can quickly turn excitement into anxiety. Many travelers find th...
